_comment: HCFullPipeline — Master Pipeline Definition (phi-compliant JSON edition)
_comment_geometry: 21 stages = fib(8). Every numeric value derives from φ≈1.618 or Fibonacci sequence.
_comment_version: Upgraded from 3.2.3 → 3.3.0 — phi-compliance pass applied per Master Directives 7.2

pipeline.name: HCFullPipeline
pipeline._comment_stage_count: 21 = fib(8). MUST be EXACTLY 21 per Master Directives 7.2.
pipeline.description: 21-stage (fib(8)) intelligent, parallel, dynamically distributed, self-aware, self-optimizing, trial-and-error capable, continuously learning execution pipeline for all Heady workloads (local and remote). Integrates HeadySims plan selection, pattern recognition, self-critique, reconnaissance scanning, mistake analysis, controlled evolution, multi-channel routing (Heady Buddy), public domain inspiration mining, bottleneck diagnostics, optimization ops scanning, and continuous monitoring feedback loops. Treat this as the single source of truth for every idea, service, flow, metric, integration, and improvement in the Heady ecosystem.
pipeline._comment_global: Global rules — all numeric values phi/fib-derived. See CRITICAL PHI FIXES in task spec.

global._comment_costBudgetDaily: Operational budget ceiling in USD. Monitored continuously.
global._comment_requireVectorScanFirst: MUST scan 3D persistent vector storage before any action.

pipeline._comment_nodePools: Resource allocation via phi-resource-weights: Hot 34%, Warm 21%, Cold 13%, Reserve 8%, Governance 5%. Total = 81% (remainder is unallocated burst). latencyMs values are φ-backoff tiers.

hot.description: User-facing tasks, core pipeline execution. Latency-critical.

warm.description: Important background work. Can tolerate minutes.

cold.description: Batch processing, ingestion, analytics. Can tolerate hours.

pipeline._comment_cslThresholds: CSL gate thresholds: phiThreshold(n) = 1 - ψⁿ × 0.5. Five canonical levels.

cslThresholds._comment_MEDIUM: phiThreshold(2) = 1 - ψ²×0.5 ≈ 0.809. Moderate alignment. Replaces all 0.7/0.8 thresholds.
cslThresholds._comment_LOW: phiThreshold(1) = 1 - ψ×0.5 ≈ 0.691. Weak alignment. Replaces 0.618 floor in many gates.
cslThresholds._comment_DEDUP: Above CRITICAL — semantic identity threshold for deduplication.

pipeline._comment_stages: EXACTLY 21 stages per Master Directives 7.2. Timeout tiers: stages 0-5 = φ³×1000=4236ms, stages 6-10 = φ⁴×1000=6854ms, stages 11-15 = φ⁵×1000=11090ms, stages 16-20 = φ⁶×1000=17944ms.

stages.name: CHANNEL_ENTRY
stages.description: Heady Buddy and multi-channel gateway. Receives requests from any channel (IDE extension, web chat, mobile app, API/MCP, email, voice, messaging), resolves user identity, syncs cross-device context and preferences, and routes to the correct pipeline branch. Two main launch modes: Admin+IDE (full cockpit) and IDE-only.

admin_ide.label: Admin + IDE
admin_ide.description: Full cockpit: Admin UI + embedded IDE with Heady services

ide_only.label: IDE Only
ide_only.description: Code workspace with Heady services quietly integrated

stages.name: RECON
stages.description: Pre-action environment reconnaissance. Maps the full landscape before any planning or execution begins: code state, config drift, service health, attack surface, dependency freshness, vector memory density, and ecosystem readiness. The system's 'eyes' before it acts. Implements: scan → map → assess → report cycle.

reconConfig._comment_driftThreshold: 1/φ = ψ ≈ 0.618 — any config drift above this flags alert
reconConfig._comment_freshnessWindowDays: fib(7) = 13 — flag dependencies older than this

stages.name: INTAKE
stages.description: Raw data ingestion from all sources (logs, news, APIs, repos, channel events, connection health metrics, public domain patterns). Informed by recon stage environment map.

intakeConfig._comment_deduplicationThreshold: DEDUP threshold — above CRITICAL for semantic identity

stages.name: CLASSIFY
stages.description: Decompose work into task graph with priorities and dependencies. Uses HeadySims UCB1 plan selection to choose the fastest viable execution strategy for each task type. Mines public domain patterns for best-practice sequencing. Classifies intent, assigns domains, and estimates costs.

classifyConfig._comment_confidenceThreshold: phiThreshold(2) = 0.809 — MEDIUM alignment required for classification

cslGate._comment_planConfidence: phiThreshold(1) = 0.691 — minimum to proceed with plan

stages.name: TRIAGE
stages.description: Route and prioritize tasks across pipeline branches. Applies urgency scoring, resource assignment, and lane routing. Determines hot/warm/cold pool allocation per task. Enforces rate limits and cost budgets.

triageConfig._comment_budgetAlertThreshold: ψ = 0.618 — alert when 61.8% of daily budget consumed

cslGate._comment_routingConfidence: phiThreshold(2) = 0.809 — MEDIUM required for routing decisions

stages.name: DECOMPOSE
stages.description: Break complex tasks into atomic subtasks with explicit dependency graphs. Estimates per-subtask latency and cost using phi-weighted heuristics. Validates subtask graph integrity before execution proceeds.

decomposeConfig._comment_latencyEstimateBufferMultiplier: φ = 1.618 — buffer estimate by golden ratio

stages.name: TRIAL_AND_ERROR
stages.description: Safe sandboxed execution of candidate solutions before committing. Multiple approaches are tested in isolated environments with automatic rollback on failure. The system TRIES things, FAILS safely, LEARNS from each attempt, and converges on the best approach. Implements: hypothesize → test → measure → adapt cycle.

trialConfig._comment_winnerThreshold: phiThreshold(1) = 0.691 — minimum score to select a winner

stages.name: ORCHESTRATE
stages.description: Fan out to agents/services via Supervisor pattern (direct routing). Uses the winning approach from TRIAL_AND_ERROR stage when available. Each task execution records latency to MC scheduler for feedback. Pattern engine observes all task completions and failures.

cslGate._comment_executionReadiness: phiThreshold(2) = 0.809 — MEDIUM required before fanning out to agents

stages.name: MONTE_CARLO
stages.description: Monte Carlo simulation and plan selection stage. Runs HeadySims UCB1 simulations to evaluate execution strategies, predict outcomes, and select optimal paths. Feeds simulation results back to scheduler for continuous improvement.

stages.name: ARENA
stages.description: Competitive evaluation stage. Runs the same task through multiple competing node/strategy configurations simultaneously. HeadyBattle scores results. Winner becomes the new default routing. HeadyPatterns captures the learning.

arenaConfig._comment_winnerPromotionThreshold: phiThreshold(2) = 0.809 — must beat this to become default

stages.name: JUDGE
stages.description: Quality gate and output validation. HeadyCheck validates all outputs against CSL thresholds. Evaluates correctness, safety, security, and alignment with Heady values. Blocks non-compliant outputs.

judgeConfig._comment_passingThreshold: phiThreshold(3) = 0.882 — HIGH required to pass judge

stages.name: APPROVE
stages.description: Approval gate. HeadyAssure certifies outputs for deployment. Applies governance policies, checks for human approval requirements on high-magnitude changes, and records approval audit trail.

approvalConfig._comment_humanApprovalRequiredAbove: 8% = fib(6)/100 change magnitude triggers human review

stages.name: EXECUTE
stages.description: Committed execution of approved tasks. Deploys changes, runs agents, invokes services. Records all execution metadata for pattern engine. Hot pool priority for user-facing operations.

stages.name: VERIFY
stages.description: Post-execution verification. Validates that executed changes produced expected outcomes. Runs integration tests, health checks, and data integrity scans. Triggers recovery if verification fails.

verifyConfig._comment_verificationThreshold: phiThreshold(3) = 0.882 — HIGH required for verification pass

stages.name: SELF_AWARENESS
stages.description: The system evaluates its own cognitive state. How confident am I? Where are my blind spots? Am I calibrated correctly? What do I NOT know that I should know? This is metacognition — thinking about thinking. Implements: introspect → calibrate → identify-gaps → adjust cycle.

stages.name: SELF_CRITIQUE
stages.description: Post-execution self-critique loop informed by self-awareness assessment. System reviews its own run: records critiques, identifies weaknesses and blind spots, runs bottleneck diagnostics, checks connection health across all channels, and proposes targeted improvements. Implements: answer → critique → refine → learn cycle.

selfCritiqueConfig._comment_critiqueRetentionRuns: fib(7) = 13 runs retained in critique history

stages.name: MISTAKE_ANALYSIS
stages.description: Deep dive into failures from this run and historical failures. Performs root cause analysis, identifies recurring mistake patterns, generates prevention rules, creates anti-regression guards, and feeds learnings back into wisdom.json and vector memory. The system LEARNS FROM MISTAKES and actively prevents them. Implements: catalog → analyze → pattern → prevent → immunize cycle.

mistakeConfig._comment_patternClusterMinSize: fib(4) = 3 minimum failures to form a pattern

stages.name: OPTIMIZATION_OPS
stages.description: Active scanning for system-wide optimization opportunities: performance bottlenecks, dead code, unused services/endpoints, cost waste, resource inefficiency, over-provisioned instances, under-utilized workers, redundant data, and suboptimal configurations. Implements: scan → profile → identify → rank → recommend cycle.

costAnalysis._comment_budgetAlertThreshold: ψ = 0.618 — alert at 61.8% of budget consumed

stages.name: CONTINUOUS_SEARCH
stages.description: Always-on search for new patterns, tools, techniques, research, public domain innovations, competitive intelligence, and emerging best practices. The system is ALWAYS LOOKING for ways to improve. Implements: search → evaluate → absorb → integrate cycle.

searchConfig._comment_relevanceThreshold: ψ = 1/φ ≈ 0.618 — minimum CSL score to absorb

stages.name: EVOLUTION
stages.description: Controlled evolution of the system itself. Proposes and tests mutations to pipeline parameters, service configurations, CSL thresholds, φ-scaling constants, and architectural patterns. Only promotes mutations that demonstrate measurable improvement. The system EVOLVES — it doesn't just optimize, it transforms. Implements: mutate → test → measure → promote/discard cycle.

stages.name: RECEIPT
stages.description: Pipeline completion and audit record. Persists all results, evolution outcomes, mistake learnings, search discoveries, and improvements. Updates registries, syncs docs, computes readiness score, verifies data integrity, and sends completion receipt to all channels. The single source of truth for pipeline run outcomes.

pipeline._comment_stopRule: Stop conditions — all thresholds phi/fib-derived per CRITICAL PHI FIXES.

stopRule.description: Build aggressively when healthy; repair first when not. Do NOT keep building when significant errors exist in core infra, data integrity, or security.

conditions._comment_threshold: ψ³/4 ≈ 0.146 — escalate when error rate exceeds this (FIXED from 0.15)

conditions._comment_count: fib(2) = 1 — any critical alarm triggers pause

conditions._comment_budgetFractionUsed: phiThreshold(3) = 0.882 — HIGH alert level for budget

pipeline._comment_checkpointProtocol: Checkpoint protocol — escalationThreshold readinessBelow FIXED from 70 → 55 (fib(10)).

checkpointProtocol.description: At each checkpoint, the system deeply re-analyzes state, configs, and patterns. This is the primary upgrade and self-correction moment. Includes self-awareness checks: the system evaluates its own performance, identifies non-optimization, and proposes improvements.

pipeline._comment_pipelineVariants: Pipeline variants per Master Directive 7.4. Four execution paths for different workloads.

pipelineVariants._comment: Variants configure which stages run and with what parameters per execution context.

fast.description: Minimal critical path for latency-sensitive user requests. Skips heavy analytics stages.
fast._comment_timeoutMultiplier: ψ = 1/φ ≈ 0.618 — fast path uses 61.8% of standard timeout

cslGate._comment_minimumQuality: phiThreshold(1) = 0.691 — fast path allows lower quality floor

full.description: Complete 21-stage pipeline. All stages active. Maximum quality and learning.

cslGate._comment_minimumQuality: phiThreshold(2) = 0.809 — full pipeline enforces MEDIUM floor

arena.description: Arena/competitive evaluation path. Focuses on MONTE_CARLO, ARENA, JUDGE for benchmarking competing strategies.

learning.description: Learning and evolution path. Runs daily to absorb yesterday's mistakes and search for improvements. Focuses on analysis, mutation, and evolution stages.

cslGate._comment_minimumQuality: phiThreshold(1) = 0.691 — learning path requires LOW floor

pipeline._comment_lanes: Lanes define autonomous operational paths that run independently of the main 21-stage flow.

system_operations.description: Autonomous system maintenance, cleanup, and optimal state operations.

learning.description: Continuous learning from mistakes and evolution — runs daily.

improvement.description: Continuous autonomous improvement tasks (refactoring, optimization, self-healing).

pipeline._comment_signals: Signal handling for founder intent and high-priority routing.

founder-intent._comment_responseTimeoutMs: φ × 1000 = 1618ms — immediate response for founder signals

pipeline._comment_phiAudit: Phi compliance audit summary — every numeric value in this config derives from φ or Fibonacci.
